content: David Orban is Head of Innovation at Al Liwan Group (Abu Dhabi). Role evolving from Interim Head of Technology & Innovation (R1-R4) to Head of Innovation (R3 AI/Labs + R4 Digital Assets) as Samson Giwa takes over IT (starts Mar 30, 2026). Reports to Amina Olupitan (COO). Role charter and Labs budget drafted, pending Amina approval. Operating between Milan, Abu Dhabi (quarterly), and London.

Al Liwan Group: CEO Michael Gale, Deputy CEO Sherwin Loh, COO Amina Olupitan. Entities: Al Liwan Capital (ALG-003, investment), Al Liwan Management (ALG-002, operations), Al Khazna Brokerage (ALG-004, Dubai), Family Services (ALG-005). ~60 people. Key: Toby O'Connor (Head IB), Miray Zaki (SEO/CIO), Veron Shim (Head WM), Jerry Brooks (Head Corp Dev), Charlie Winckworth (General Counsel). Samson Giwa starts as Head of Technology Mar 30. ADGM licensing pending. Corrections from David: Shaheen AlShanableh (not Ahmad), Hala Fouad/Lynda Leong/Mohammed Fathi/Jasmine Ghazal all departed.

Q1 2026 KPI status (as of Mar 22, 9 days remaining): R3 AI Strategy near complete (role charter drafted, 5 implementation tracks defined from 8 AI workflow interviews, 18 opportunities scored). R4 Digital Assets draft complete (was at risk, upgraded Mar 22 — 3-horizon framework with 7 months of evidence). R1 IT governance near complete, transitioning to Samson. R2 KM strategy in progress, medium risk. Key deliverables: Role Charter and Digital Assets Strategy Framework need Amina review before Mar 31.

Active Al Liwan partnership/deal pipeline: (1) Maritime AI Venture Studio with SRI/Degree — $40M raise, IB team (Randy+Toby) engaged, Leandro Agro contact, waiting on Degree materials. (2) ZeroCap JV — LOI signed Aug 2025, white-label digital asset services, awaiting licensing. (3) NVIDIA AI Technology Center — exploratory authorized, Simon See contact. (4) AML Labs — KYB/AML evaluated, David championing, handoff to Samson. (5) Alpha10X — NDA stage, decision intelligence. (6) NurForge/Authentise — defense manufacturing, $23M Tawazun. (7) Rogo AI — IB deal sourcing evaluated.

Al Liwan Labs 5 implementation tracks (from AI Workflow Interview Analysis, 8 interviews, Mar 2026): Track 1 Branded Presentation Pipeline (Veron, Luke, Nate, Jerry — 16/18 score, highest priority quick win). Track 2 Executive Intelligence Layer (Ana Capuder — blocked on ARM laptop swap). Track 3 Deal Flow Intelligence (Nate's RAG migration from OpenAI to Claude). Track 4 Operational Documentation (Miray, Luke). Track 5 Relationship & Contact Management (Jad, Veron, Ana). Champions: Luke Nesci, Nate Kelleher, Ana Capuder. Skeptic: Miray Zaki (target for Copilot+Claude May 2026).

Dex vault state after Mar 22 import session: 65 person pages (56 internal, 9 external), 35 meetings (weeks 06, 10, 11), 17 reports (weekly 01-12 + monthly Sep-Dec 2025 + Feb 2026), 7 AI workflow interview summaries, 4 project pages (IT Handover, Labs, Role Charter, Digital Assets Strategy), Quarter Goals populated, pillars updated, auto-link script (.scripts/auto-link-people.cjs), people index JSON. Source files in /Dev/alliwan-bunch/ and /Dev/alliwan-other/.
